name: Glazed Raspberry Orange Turkey Breast
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Orange peel, grated (I used dried and it was fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place turkey breast in a 9x9-inch baking pan.
3. Pour orange juice over the turkey; sprinkle with sage, thyme, pepper, salt, and orange peel.
4. Roast at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes, basting occasionally.
5. Combine raspberries and sugar. Place around the turkey.
6. Continue roasting for 10-15 minutes.
7. Let turkey stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
8. Serve raspberry sauce over turkey slices.
